current_implemented_build: V52.3 TrustMap Humanistic Visual Object Recovery
release_chain_status: V52.3 replaces crude CSS geometry with humanistic inline SVG symbolic objects and adds overview, domain layer, and detail/action layer states inside TrustMap. No new top-level tabs were added.
top_level_tab_rule: Do not add more top-level tabs. Upgrade existing workspaces only.
version_label_rule: Build and version labels belong in Settings/admin metadata and repo documentation only. They must not appear as executive-facing dashboard content.
core_thesis: AI is controlled before it acts, or it is not controlled at all.
core_question: Should this action be operationally admissible right now?
v52_3_changes: overview to domain layer to detail/action layer navigation

implemented_release_train.v52: Model Registry Foundation and Human-First Executive Control View
implemented_release_train.v52.1: TrustMap Visual Restoration and Layer Patch
implemented_release_train.v52.2: Guided Onboarding, Routed Dashboard, and Layered TrustMap Patch

prototype_boundary: The current public build is a static advisory prototype. It models decisions and proof records but does not perform production enforcement or live enterprise integrations.
known_limitations: SVG symbols are prototype-grade visual objects, not final brand-grade illustrations
model registry remains scaffold-level and demo-directional
hands-on Firefox, Brave, Android, and desktop QA still needs to be performed after GitHub Pages deploys
